content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — SettingsView.swift:11 shows user-facing string "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" for the AI Sort toggle.
Pierre: Apple reviewers may flag user-visible "Experimental" language as suggesting an unfinished feature shipped to production, potentially triggering review questions about stability/data loss (losing sort order). Consider rephrasing to describe the feature's behavior/limitations without words like "experimental" or "unstable" (e.g. "Beta features" implications), or gate it behind a clearer, more polished description if it's ready for release.
